meta.source: Cambridge English A1 Movers A-Z Word List (2018 exam update)
meta.note: 涵蓋官方 Movers 級全部字彙（不含 Starters 已學字），另含數字21-100與序數1st-20th代表字。names 為官方要求會認讀的人名，不列入測驗題。

words.sentence: Bats fly at night.
The parrot is in a cage.
Dolphins jump out of the water.
I feed my rabbit every day.
There is a fly in my soup!
Kangaroos can hop very well.
The kitten is playing with a ball.
The lion is sleeping under the tree.
Pandas eat leaves all day.
My parrot can say my name.
words.sentence_zh: 我的鸚鵡會說我的名字。

words.sentence: Penguins live where it is cold.
The puppy likes to run and jump.
The rabbit is eating a carrot.
Sharks have a lot of teeth.
A snail is very slow.
A whale is bigger than a shark.
There is a bottle of water on the table.
I eat noodles from a bowl.
Mice love eating cheese.
Dad drinks coffee every morning.
My mum is a good cook.
A cup of tea, please.
Can I have a glass of milk?
I'm hungry. Let's eat!

I had noodles for lunch.
We make pancakes on Sunday.
Pasta with sauce is yummy.
words.sentence_zh: 加醬汁的義大利麵很好吃。

words.sentence: Let's have a picnic by the lake.
Put the sandwich on the plate.
Salad is good for you.
I made a cheese sandwich.
words.sentence_zh: 我做了一個起司三明治。

words.sentence: I like tomato sauce on pasta.
words.sentence_zh: 我喜歡義大利麵加番茄醬汁。

words.sentence: The soup is too hot.
This milkshake is very sweet.

My back hurts.
My uncle has a black beard.
I was sick, but now I'm better.
words.sentence_zh: 我之前生病了，但現在好多了。

words.sentence: She has blonde hair.
I have a cold and a cough.
That's a bad cough!
He has curly hair.
The dentist looks at my teeth.
The doctor helps sick people.
I can't hear well. I have an earache.
That cat is very fat.
I'm fine, thank you.

My leg hurts.

The nurse helps the doctor.
Put the parrot on my shoulder.

words.sentence: I feel sick. I can't go to school.
words.sentence_zh: 我覺得不舒服，不能去上學。

words.sentence: My stomach is full.
I ate too much. I have a stomach-ache.
Elephants are very strong.
She has a temperature and must stay in bed.
words.sentence_zh: 她發燒了，必須待在床上。

words.sentence: My grandpa is tall and thin.
I'm tired. I want to sleep.
Brush your teeth every day.
I have a toothache. I must see the dentist.
My toothbrush is red.
Put toothpaste on your toothbrush.
I was ill last week and I'm still weak.
words.sentence_zh: 我上週生病，現在還很虛弱。

words.sentence: I don't feel well today.
My cough is worse today.
words.sentence_zh: 我的咳嗽今天更嚴重了。

words.sentence: That was the worst day!
This app helps me learn English.
words.sentence_zh: 這個應用程式幫我學英文。

words.sentence: Let's play in the break.
Listen to the CD and sing.
Draw a circle on the paper.
Find the differences in the two pictures.
words.sentence_zh: 找出兩張圖的不同之處。

words.sentence: The two hats are different.
This question is very difficult.
We watched a DVD about whales.
words.sentence_zh: 我們看了一片關於鯨魚的DVD。

words.sentence: That's easy! I know the answer.
I read an e-book on the laptop.
Send an email to your teacher.
words.sentence_zh: 寄一封電子郵件給你的老師。

words.sentence: I do my homework after school.
What a good idea!
We look for pictures on the internet.
Dad works on his laptop.
This machine makes noodles.
What does this word mean?
Mum sent me a message.
words.sentence_zh: 媽媽傳了一則訊息給我。

words.sentence: I made two mistakes in the test.

Piano practice is at four o'clock.

A circle is a shape.
A square has four sides.
Miss Lin teaches us English.

words.sentence_zh: 放學後爸爸傳簡訊給我。

words.sentence: I think this game is exciting.

words.sentence: Can you hop on one leg?

words.sentence_zh: 我生日得到新的冰刀鞋。

words.sentence: We go ice skating in winter.
Kick the ball to me!
The ball is in the net!

words.sentence_zh: 他是我們隊上最棒的球員。

words.sentence: I ride my bike to school.

words.sentence_zh: 她的直排輪鞋是粉紅色的。

words.sentence: The kitchen is downstairs.

words.sentence: That tall building is a hospital.

words.sentence: Taipei is a big city.

words.sentence: The shopping centre is always busy.

words.sentence: The kitten hides under the bed.

words.sentence_zh: 我們邀請奶奶來派對吧。

words.sentence: The funny clown makes me laugh.
